description: Track shipments, reduce RTO, optimize delivery

items.name: Carrier integration
items.tactic: DHL, FedEx, UPS, regional via ShipStation. Auto-select cheapest+fastest.

items.name: Real-time tracking
items.tactic: Carrier webhooks: in_transit, out_for_delivery, delivered. Buyer auto-notified.

items.name: RTO prevention
items.tactic: Address validation + SMS 1 day before. Reduce RTO 5% → <1%.

items.name: Returns automation
items.tactic: Auto-generate return label. Track reverse logistics. Refund on delivery.

items.name: SLA monitoring
items.tactic: Promised 5d actual 6+ = alert. On-time % per carrier. Switch underperformers.
